transcript:
say hey to my Disco 4 I'm going to show you 
around some of the mods that I've done to make it even better offroad So I've opted for 
the 18in wheels which you get from the new new Ranger defenders and these are shaw in some 
Falcon Wild Peaks some runny flaps mud flaps I've also got some Terrairma rock sliders or 
tree sliders however you want to call those As you'll see here I've got a Mante raised air 
intake roof rack And this is made by Patriot a British-based company Very big light bar along 
the top Pretty crazy what that does We've got that on a is it a three-way switch so we 
can basically have an off position We can have it on at any time And also we can have 
it on working with full beams which has been pretty handy And then here again just cosmetic 
really but we've got the plastic trimmed round You'll also start noticing around some of this 
trim I got the old rattle cans of Raptor paint our eye camper tent Seriously good bit of kit 
Those are the mods that we've done to our Disco
